name: acceptance-gate-kit
description: OneNexus engineering quality tools — acceptance gate for AI-generated features.

plugins.name: acceptance-gate
plugins.description: Acceptance gate for AI-generated features: contract, self-generated evals, evidence-backed verification with deterministic hook enforcement.

plugins.name: feature-loop
plugins.description: Feature development loop on top of acceptance-gate: brainstorm → contract+evals (Gate 1) → plan → execute → multi-agent verify workflow → evidence + human signoff (Gate 2). Requires acceptance-gate + superpowers.

plugins.name: design-loop
plugins.description: Design-aware sub-track for feature-loop: standardizes the 2-repo design-of-record → port → fidelity pipeline as a conditional S1-D mockup + Gate-2 evidence bookend. Composes with feature-loop (0 edits) + acceptance-gate (reuses its P0 design gate) via config wiring, an auto-triggering skill, and user-run commands. Orchestrates the first-party Claude Design bridge (/design-login, /design-sync) — never automates it.
